summary: Pre-Phase-1 snapshot of retrieval contamination methods in rag_engine.py

_fallback_pages_for_query.description: Hardcoded document-name-to-page mappings for 'final annual report', 'wipo', 'leac' and specific query keywords

_supporting_pages_for_query.description: Eval-specific page injection for known real-eval finance facts

_force_supporting_page_coverage.description: Forces expected source pages into final top-k by calling _supporting_pages_for_query

_augment_with_page_fallbacks.description: Injects fallback pages with boosted score floors based on _supporting_pages_for_query

_ensure_page_fallback_coverage.description: Uses supporting_source_page metadata flag to prioritize chunks in ranking

_ensure_multi_doc_coverage.description: Uses supporting_source_page metadata flag to prefer candidates from missing docs

supporting_source_page_references.description: These lines reference the supporting_source_page metadata flag, which must not influence production ranking

warning: This snapshot captures contaminated retrieval state. Metrics derived from this code must be marked deprecated_contaminated.
